strength_days.name: CFNYC — Deadlift
blocks: Strength: Deadlift 5-5-5 building, then 5-5 across (leave 1-2 reps in reserve)
Conditioning: 3 RFT — 10 strict pull-ups, 10 power cleans (75/105), 20/16 cal row
Note: heavy posterior-chain + grip; pace the metcon, it sets up the week

nutrition.tip: Highest-carb training day — heavy pull + grippy metcon. Electrolytes intra.

strength_days.name: Back Squat + Power
strength_days.summary: Box jumps → back squat 4×5 @ 185 lb → jump squats → accessories
blocks: Warm-up squats: bar×5, 95×5, 135×3, 165×2 (ramp to working weight)
A. Box Jumps 5×3 — done FIRST, fully fresh, max solid landing height (RFD for the sprint)
B. Back Squat 4×5 @ 185 lb (80% of 230) — drive up fast, 1–2 reps in reserve, rest 2:30–3:00
C. Jump Squats 4×4 — empty bar or 2×15–25 lb DBs, explosive, full reset each rep, rest 90s
D. DB Walking Lunges 3×10/leg (~25–35 lb DBs) · DB RDL 3×10 (~30–40 lb, light — back still recovering) · Calf Raises 3×15
Optional finisher: 3×20s hard row/bike, 2 min rest
Progression: if all 4×5 @ 185 feel ≤7/10 effort, go 190–195 next week toward the Week 6 test

nutrition.tip: Highest-calorie day — fuel the power work. Carbs around the session.

strength_days.name: CFNYC — Bench Press
blocks: Strength: A1 Bench Press 5-4-3 building + 1 back-off set (-20%); A2 3-pt DB Row 4×8-10/side
Conditioning: 12-min AMRAP, 6-9-12 ring dips / toes-to-bar / cal row
Note: upper body — no leg conflict; row the AMRAP smooth, not as a sprint

nutrition.tip: Upper-body day. Prioritize veggies/fiber + hydration since legs are light.

strength_days.name: Rest / Mobility
strength_days.summary: Full recovery after the long row
blocks: Full rest, or 20–30 min easy walk + mobility (hips, ankles, T-spine, lats)
Optional: 10–15 min light rowing technique drills (legs-only, arms-only), no intensity

nutrition.tip: Rest day (lowest cals). No pre/post needed — spread protein ~35-40g across 4 meals. Anti-inflammatory foods, hydration.
